title: Dark Mode Ultra
description:
Dark Mode Ultra changes vanilla bright GUI colors to more darker tones,
Also supports mods.
body:
**Tired of the classic old-school Minecraft GUI? Give your game a fresh new look with this darker redesign**  
# 
![Resource Pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89c6c07b07ed09a62f9c99f8efefbc58f9aa0a06.jpeg)

Dark Mode Ultra transforms Minecraft’s bright GUI into sleek, darker tones for a more modern and eye-friendly experience.

![Supported Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d1c0f03253d0fc448a199e8b4f82032cf6eba44.png)
## 1.21.x
- ✅ Modmenu 
- ✅ Cloth Config API 
- ✅ Xaero's Minimap 
- ✅ Entity Texture Features
- ✅ Just Enought Items (JEI) 
- ✅ Simple Voice Chat 
- ✅ Language Reload 
- ✅ Inventory Profiles Next 
- ✅ libIPN 
- ✅ Patchouli
- ✅ CreativeCore
- ✅ Shulker Box Tooltip
- ✅ YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
- ✅ MaLiLib
- ✅ Better Advancements
- ✅ Polymorph
- ✅ Trinkets
- ✅ Waystones
- ✅ Fabric
- ✅ EMI
- ✅ Traveler's Backpack
- ✅ Easy Anvils


![Planning to add](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8f93eedf4e3806f2f18d9db52fa62cd3027351c.png)
- Most Popular Mods


![compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46853417ee2bac10ffe2b96e575a5297fef3a523.png)
 - Created For Minecraft 1.21-1.21.1, should work with any newer version till new gui elements are added.
- Backport versions added for 1.15-1.20.x
- To change loading screen color to dark just go into settings/accessibilty and change monochrome logo to on.
